summary: The batch exhibits a comprehensive coverage of all attribute values, but there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented modes. The diversity could be improved by incorporating more edge cases and varying the emotional tone.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more diverse emotional tones in the text, especially for common scenarios.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance the diversity of the samples.
Reduce the frequency of informal style and account_issue intent to balance the representation.
